records.ety: [OE. entrelacen, F. entrelacer. See Inter-, and Lace.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Interlaced (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Interlacing (?).]

defs: To unite, as by lacing together; to insert or interpose one thing within another; to intertwine; to interweave.
quotes: Severed into stripes That interlaced each other.
The epic way is everywhere interlaced with dialogue.
